title: Persephone Loop
summary: An ambient looping animation following Persephone through the seasons — spring blooms give way to an autumnal descent, cycling endlessly. No interaction required; just watch.

title: Petal Pulse
summary: Hover over the blooms to make them pulse, shift colour, and shed petals. A meditative interactive botanical piece — the piece responds to you without demanding anything.

title: Starfield Navigator
summary: Click through constellations to reveal short myth fragments — the story behind the stars. A small, exploratory interactive mythology reference.

title: Hades, Rising
summary: A character reveal animation — Hades emerging from shadow into a deep indigo light. Click anywhere to trigger the entrance sequence.

title: Lunar Calendar
summary: Select a moon phase to reveal a short ritual note or lore fragment. A soft, interactive reference piece for the curious and the intentional.

title: Vine Growth
summary: Tap to grow — watch a botanical vine spread across the canvas, branching in a different pattern each time. Simple, satisfying, endlessly repeatable.
